title: × Vappaculum superbiens
taxonomy: × Vappaculum superbiens is a genus of orchids in the family Orchidaceae. The classification of × Vappaculum superbiens places it within the order Asparagales. It is a hybrid species, created by crossing two different orchid genera, likely Vappaculum and a species from the genus Dendrobium. This hybridization is a common method used by orchid enthusiasts to create new and unique species. As a result, × Vappaculum superbiens is not a naturally occurring species but rather a cultivated one.
